Operation 'createContactNote' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Enhanced version clarifies: (1) the scoping to network and contact, (2) authentication requirement, (3) required input parameters (network_id, contact identifier), (4) what is returned (note object with id, timestamp, content), and (5) persistence and future retrievability. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: Create a note for a contact in your network.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a note for a network contact
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new note associated with a specific contact in the authenticated user's network. The note is scoped to the specified network and contact. Requires the network_id path parameter and contact identifier in the request body. Returns the created note object with its unique identifier, creation timestamp, and content. Notes are stored persistently and can be retrieved or updated later.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Enhanced version clarifies: (1) the scoping to network and contact, (2) authentication requirement, (3) required input parameters (network_id, contact identifier), (4) what is returned (note object with id, timestamp, content), and (5) persistence and future retrievability. This helps AI agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.description_suggestion: Import one or more contacts into the authenticated user's network. Accepts a batch of contact data in the request body. Requires authentication and valid contact data.
